languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

languages.text: "Подумать только — сам Себериан фон Валанциус разгуливает по палубам корабля! Если бы я не видел его своими глазами — не поверил бы".
"To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."
languages.original_text: "Подумать только — сам Себериан фон Валанциус разгуливает по палубам корабля! Если бы я не видел его своими глазами — не поверил бы".

traits.locale_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."
"To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."
"To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

languages.text: 「ヴァランシウスのシベリアンが、この船のデッキを歩いてるなんて！自分で目で見なければ、信じられなかった」
languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

traits.locale_text: 「バルアンシウスのシベリアが、この船のデッキを歩いてるなんて！自分で目で見なければ、信じられなかったわ。」

languages.text: « Quand je pense que Seberian von Valancius en personne se trouve à bord de ce vaisseau ! Si je ne l'avais pas vu de mes propres yeux, je ne l'aurais jamais cru. »
languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

traits.locale_text: « Quand je pense que Seberian von Valancius en personne se trouve à bord de ce vaisseau ! Si je ne l'avais pas vu de mes propres yeux, je ne l'aurais jamais cru. »

languages.text: "Der Gedanke, dass Seberian von Valancius selbst über die Decks dieses Schiffs streift! Hätte ich ihn nicht mit eigenen Augen gesehen, hätte ich es niemals geglaubt."
languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

traits.locale_text: "Der Gedanke, dass Seberian von Valancius selbst über die Decks dieses Schiffs streift! Hätte ich ihn nicht mit eigenen Augen gesehen, hätte ich es niemals geglaubt."

languages.text: "Seberian von Valancius'un bizzat kendisinin bu geminin güvertelerini arşınladığını düşünmek! Kendi gözlerimle görmeseydim asla inanmazdım."
languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius'un bizzat kendisinin bu geminin güvertelerini arşınladığını düşünmek! Kendi gözlerimle görmeseydim asla inanmazdım."

languages.text: «¡Y pensar que el mismísimo Seberian von Valancius se está paseando por las cubiertas de esta nave! De no haberlo visto con mis propios ojos, jamás lo habría creído».
languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

traits.locale_text: «¡Y pensar que el mismísimo Seberian von Valancius se está paseando por las cubiertas de esta nave! De no haberlo visto con mis propios ojos, jamás lo habría creído».

languages.text: “塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯本人居然踏上了这艘舰船！若非亲眼所见，我是必然不会相信的。”
languages.original_text: "To think that Seberian von Valancius himself is walking the decks of this ship! If I hadn't seen him with my own eyes, I would never have believed it."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯本人居然踏上了这艘舰船！若非亲眼所见，我是必然不会相信的。”
